title: salix helvetica var. velutina
intro: Salix helvetica var. velutina, also known as the Velvet Willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the willow family (Salicaceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Salix helvetica var. velutina include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a tea, salve, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its therapeutic effects.
